crossRefs.label: Remove the rear door glass regulator.
Adjust the rear door glass erection.

blocks.text: Confirm that the rear power window motor rotates smoothly and normally when battery voltage is applied between each terminal.

items: If the power window motor rotates and the position reaches the limit position, the 12V battery shall be disconnected immediately.

items.text: If there is no abnormality in motor rotation, inspection is complete.
If there is no abnormality in motor rotation, inspection is complete.
If there is an abnormality in motor rotation, proceed to the next step
If there is an abnormality in motor rotation, proceed to the next step

blocks.text: Remove the rear door glass regulator. Confirm that the rear power window motor (A) rotates smoothly and normally when battery voltage is applied between each terminal.

refs.label: Remove the rear door glass regulator.
Adjust the rear door glass erection.

items.text: If there is any abnormality in the rotation of the motor, Replace rear door glass regulator.
If there is any abnormality in the rotation of the motor, Replace rear door glass regulator.
If there is no abnormality in the rotation of the motor, the cord may be broken, shorted, or Adjust the rear door glass erection.

refs.label: Adjust the rear door glass erection.

items.text: If there is no abnormality in the rotation of the motor, the cord may be broken, shorted, or Adjust the rear door glass erection.

refs.label: Adjust the rear door glass erection.

blocks.text: Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
